title: Philippines BIR Form 1701A - Annual Income Tax Return for Individuals Earning Income Purely from Business/Profession
description: The Bureau of Internal Revenue's (BIR) annual income tax return for individuals earning income purely from self-employment/business or from the practice of a profession (not mixed with compensation income, which instead files BIR Form 1700 or 1701), covering either the Optional Standard Deduction (OSD) method under graduated income tax rates or the 8% flat income tax rate in lieu of the graduated rates and percentage tax, available to taxpayers whose gross sales/receipts and other non-operating income for the year do not exceed PHP 3,000,000. This document models BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), a genuine, directly downloadable text-layer PDF published on BIR's own CDN with no login, CAPTCHA, or WAF gate - the strongest single sourcing shape available for this vertical this cycle. This adds the Philippines' third vertical (Taxes), and closes this registry's global Taxes vertical to 17/17 jurisdictions. The form has no AcroForm/Widget field annotations (it is a flat print-and-fill form); every field, checkbox group, and box count was read directly from the extracted text layer and cross-verified against high-resolution renders of both pages. Out of scope for this v1.0.0: Part III (Details of Payment - a repeating table across 4 payment-mode rows: Cash/Bank Debit Memo, Check, Tax Debit Memo, Other - structurally a repeating container with no native GovSchema type yet, pending GSP-0009); the two reference tax-rate tables (Table 1 effective 2018-2022, Table 2 effective 2023 onward) used to manually compute the graduated tax due, which are printed reference data rather than input fields; and BIR Form 1700 (compensation-only filers) and BIR Form 1701 (mixed income, or income exceeding the 8%-option threshold), each a related but distinct form. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing method and every disclosed interpretive judgment call.

source.documentRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates) - Annual Income Tax Return for Individuals Earning Income Purely from Business/Profession, Bureau of Internal Revenue

verification.notes: This GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-1466) screened all four of the Philippines' remaining vertical gaps (Passport, DMV, Taxes, Visa) and found all four sourceable in some form. Passport (passport.gov.ph, a live unauthenticated appointment wizard) was set aside after confirming its own AJAX timeslot-availability endpoint returns genuinely scarce live inventory (e.g. 'Available Slots: 1') for real DFA appointment sites; walking far enough into the wizard's later steps to observe its personal-information field enumerations would have required selecting and holding one of those real, limited slots, which this cycle judged an unacceptable side effect on a live citizen-facing government booking system and did not do (see the source issue's own comment thread for the full finding, left as an open backlog candidate). BIR Form 1701A was picked instead: a genuine, directly downloadable, unblocked (no login/CAPTCHA/WAF) text-layer PDF on BIR's own CDN, extracted via pdfjs-dist with line reconstruction and cross-verified against full-page Chromium renders (Playwright) since the PDF carries no AcroForm/Widget annotations, so box counts for boxed fields (TIN, RDO Code, ZIP Code) were confirmed visually rather than from form-field metadata. Every checkbox group without an explicit 'mark one' instruction (Taxpayer Type, Alphanumeric Tax Code, Civil Status) was modeled as single-select based on the categories being mutually exclusive by construction, disclosed here as an interpretive judgment call. Item 9A's ZIP Code box count and item 41/42/50/51's 2-line-only cap on itemized other income (with no stated continuation mechanism) are also disclosed. Part III (Details of Payment) is deliberately out of scope as a repeating structure pending GSP-0009 (see description). Status remains 'draft' pending an independent second reviewer's field-by-field pass.

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: For the Year — YYYY
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 1 (YYYY portion of MM/YYYY box grid)

fields.name: periodEndMonth
fields.label: For the Year — MM
fields.description: Month the covered period ends. 12 for a taxpayer filing a full calendar year; a different month applies only when isShortPeriodReturn is true.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 1 (MM portion of MM/YYYY box grid)

fields.name: isAmendedReturn
fields.label: Amended Return?
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 2

fields.name: isShortPeriodReturn
fields.label: Short Period Return?
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 3

fields.name: tin
fields.label: Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN)
fields.description: The 9 user-fillable digits of the TIN, grouped 3-3-3. The form additionally pre-prints a fixed, non-editable '00000' branch-code suffix after these boxes; that constant is not user input and is not modeled as a field.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 4

fields.name: rdoCode
fields.label: RDO Code
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 5

fields.name: taxpayerType
fields.label: Taxpayer Type
fields.description: The form prints these as two checkboxes with no explicit 'mark one' instruction; modeled as single-select since the two categories are mutually exclusive by construction.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 6 (Single Proprietor / Professional)

fields.name: alphanumericTaxCode
fields.label: Alphanumeric Tax Code (ATC)
fields.description: II012 Business Income - Graduated IT Rates; II014 Income from Profession - Graduated IT Rates; II015 Business Income - 8% IT Rate; II017 Income from Profession - 8% IT Rate. Printed as four checkboxes with no explicit 'mark one' instruction; modeled as single-select since the categories are mutually exclusive by construction, and correlate with taxpayerType and taxRateOption.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 7 (II012 / II014 / II015 / II017)

fields.name: taxpayerName
fields.label: Taxpayer's Name (Last Name, First Name, Middle Name)
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 8

fields.name: registeredAddress
fields.label: Registered Address
fields.description: The form warns that if the registered address differs from the taxpayer's current address, the taxpayer must first update it at the RDO using BIR Form No. 1905 before filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 9

fields.name: registeredAddressZipCode
fields.label: ZIP Code
fields.description: 4-digit Philippine ZIP code, embedded at the end of the address box grid. The exact box count could not be pixel-confirmed from the rendered form; modeled per the standard PH 4-digit postal code convention.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 9A

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth (MM/DD/YYYY)
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 10

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email Address
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 11

fields.name: citizenship
fields.label: Citizenship
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 12

fields.name: isClaimingForeignTaxCredits
fields.label: Claiming Foreign Tax Credits?
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 13

fields.name: foreignTaxNumber
fields.label: Foreign Tax Number, if applicable
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 14

fields.name: contactNumber
fields.label: Contact Number (Landline/Cellphone No.)
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 15

fields.name: civilStatus
fields.label: Civil Status
fields.description: Printed as four checkboxes with no explicit 'mark one' instruction; modeled as single-select since the categories are mutually exclusive by construction.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 16

fields.name: spouseHasIncome
fields.label: If married, spouse has income?
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 17

fields.name: filingStatus
fields.label: Filing Status
fields.description: Determines whether the spouse's own identifying details (Part V) and per-item Taxpayer/Spouse columns throughout the return must also be completed. Under separate_filing the spouse instead files their own BIR Form 1701A.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 18 (Joint Filing / Separate Filing)

fields.name: taxRateOption
fields.label: Tax Rate
fields.description: Graduated rates with Optional Standard Deduction (OSD) as the mode of deduction, gating Part IV.A (items 36-45); or the 8% flat income tax rate in lieu of the graduated rates under Sec. 24(A) and percentage tax under Sec. 116 of the NIRC, gating Part IV.B (items 47-55) — available only when the taxpayer's gross sales/receipts plus other non-operating income for the year is P3,000,000 or less.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 19

fields.name: taxDueAmount
fields.label: Tax Due — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: From Part IV.A Item 46 (graduated rates) or Part IV.B Item 56 (8% flat rate), depending on taxRateOption.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 20A

fields.name: taxDueSpouseAmount
fields.label: Tax Due — Spouse
fields.description: From Part IV.A Item 46 (graduated rates) or Part IV.B Item 56 (8% flat rate), depending on taxRateOption. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 20B

fields.name: totalTaxCreditsAmount
fields.label: Less: Total Tax Credits/Payments — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Sum of Part IV.C items 57-63 (Prior Year's Excess Credits, quarterly payments/withholding, foreign tax credits, and other tax credits/payments). System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 21A

fields.name: totalTaxCreditsSpouseAmount
fields.label: Less: Total Tax Credits/Payments — Spouse
fields.description: Sum of Part IV.C items 57-63 (Prior Year's Excess Credits, quarterly payments/withholding, foreign tax credits, and other tax credits/payments). System-computed. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 21B

fields.name: netTaxPayableAmount
fields.label: Net Tax Payable/(Overpayment) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: taxDue minus totalTaxCredits. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 22A

fields.name: netTaxPayableSpouseAmount
fields.label: Net Tax Payable/(Overpayment) — Spouse
fields.description: taxDue minus totalTaxCredits. System-computed. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 22B

fields.name: secondInstallmentAmount
fields.label: Less: Portion of Tax Payable Allowed for 2nd Installment (due on/before Oct 15) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Capped at 50% of taxDue; available only when netTaxPayable exceeds P2,000 per NIRC installment rules referenced by the form.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 23A

fields.name: secondInstallmentSpouseAmount
fields.label: Less: Portion of Tax Payable Allowed for 2nd Installment (due on/before Oct 15) — Spouse
fields.description: Capped at 50% of taxDue; available only when netTaxPayable exceeds P2,000 per NIRC installment rules referenced by the form. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 23B

fields.name: taxPayableAfterInstallmentAmount
fields.label: Amount of Tax Payable/(Overpayment) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: netTaxPayable minus secondInstallment. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 24A

fields.name: taxPayableAfterInstallmentSpouseAmount
fields.label: Amount of Tax Payable/(Overpayment) — Spouse
fields.description: netTaxPayable minus secondInstallment. System-computed. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 24B

fields.name: surchargeAmount
fields.label: Surcharge — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Penalty component: surcharge.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 25A

fields.name: surchargeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Surcharge — Spouse
fields.description: Penalty component: surcharge. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 25B

fields.name: interestAmount
fields.label: Interest — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Penalty component: interest.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 26A

fields.name: interestSpouseAmount
fields.label: Interest — Spouse
fields.description: Penalty component: interest. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 26B

fields.name: compromiseAmount
fields.label: Compromise — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Penalty component: compromise penalty.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 27A

fields.name: compromiseSpouseAmount
fields.label: Compromise — Spouse
fields.description: Penalty component: compromise penalty. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 27B

fields.name: totalPenaltiesAmount
fields.label: Total Penalties — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Sum of surcharge, interest, and compromise. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 28A

fields.name: totalPenaltiesSpouseAmount
fields.label: Total Penalties — Spouse
fields.description: Sum of surcharge, interest, and compromise. System-computed. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 28B

fields.name: totalAmountPayableAmount
fields.label: Total Amount Payable/(Overpayment) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: taxPayableAfterInstallment plus totalPenalties. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 29A

fields.name: totalAmountPayableSpouseAmount
fields.label: Total Amount Payable/(Overpayment) — Spouse
fields.description: taxPayableAfterInstallment plus totalPenalties. System-computed. Only applicable under joint filing.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 29B

fields.name: aggregateAmountPayable
fields.label: Aggregate Amount Payable/(Overpayment)
fields.description: Single combined amount (not split by Taxpayer/Spouse column): sum of totalAmountPayableAmount and totalAmountPayableSpouseAmount. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 30

fields.name: overpaymentDisposition
fields.label: Overpayment disposition
fields.description: The form's own instruction: 'mark one (1) box only... irrevocable.' Applies only when aggregateAmountPayable represents an overpayment (a negative value).
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 30 disposition checkboxes

fields.name: signatoryName
fields.label: Printed Name of Taxpayer/Authorized Representative
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, signature block

fields.name: signedDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration under penalties of perjury
fields.description: Declaration that the return has been made in good faith, verified, and is true and correct, made under the penalties of perjury.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, perjury declaration and Data Privacy Act notice above the signature block

fields.name: numberOfAttachments
fields.label: Number of Attachments
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.1, Item 31

fields.name: gradSalesRevenueAmount
fields.label: Sales/Revenues/Receipts/Fees — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 36A

fields.name: gradSalesRevenueSpouseAmount
fields.label: Sales/Revenues/Receipts/Fees — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 36B

fields.name: gradSalesReturnsAllowancesDiscountsAmount
fields.label: Less: Sales Returns, Allowances and Discounts — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 37A

fields.name: gradSalesReturnsAllowancesDiscountsSpouseAmount
fields.label: Less: Sales Returns, Allowances and Discounts — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 37B

fields.name: gradNetSalesAmount
fields.label: Net Sales/Revenues/Receipts/Fees — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: gradSalesRevenue minus gradSalesReturnsAllowancesDiscounts. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 38A

fields.name: gradNetSalesSpouseAmount
fields.label: Net Sales/Revenues/Receipts/Fees — Spouse
fields.description: gradSalesRevenue minus gradSalesReturnsAllowancesDiscounts. System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 38B

fields.name: gradOptionalStandardDeductionAmount
fields.label: Less: Optional Standard Deduction (OSD) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: 40% of gradNetSales. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 39A

fields.name: gradOptionalStandardDeductionSpouseAmount
fields.label: Less: Optional Standard Deduction (OSD) — Spouse
fields.description: 40% of gradNetSales. System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 39B

fields.name: gradNetIncomeAmount
fields.label: Net Income — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: gradNetSales minus gradOptionalStandardDeduction. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 40A

fields.name: gradNetIncomeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Net Income — Spouse
fields.description: gradNetSales minus gradOptionalStandardDeduction. System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 40B

fields.name: gradOtherIncomeDescription1
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Description (line 1)
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 41 (description)

fields.name: gradOtherIncome1Amount
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Amount (line 1) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 41A

fields.name: gradOtherIncome1SpouseAmount
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Amount (line 1) — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 41B

fields.name: gradOtherIncomeDescription2
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Description (line 2)
fields.description: The form provides exactly 2 lines for itemizing other non-operating income (items 41-42), with no stated continuation mechanism for a filer with more than 2 categories.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 42 (description)

fields.name: gradOtherIncome2Amount
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Amount (line 2) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 42A

fields.name: gradOtherIncome2SpouseAmount
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Amount (line 2) — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 42B

fields.name: gradGppShareIncomeAmount
fields.label: Amount Received/Share in Income by a Partner from a General Professional Partnership (GPP) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 43A

fields.name: gradGppShareIncomeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Amount Received/Share in Income by a Partner from a General Professional Partnership (GPP) — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 43B

fields.name: gradTotalOtherIncomeAmount
fields.label: Total Other Income — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Sum of gradOtherIncome1, gradOtherIncome2, and gradGppShareIncome. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 44A

fields.name: gradTotalOtherIncomeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Total Other Income — Spouse
fields.description: Sum of gradOtherIncome1, gradOtherIncome2, and gradGppShareIncome. System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 44B

fields.name: gradTotalTaxableIncomeAmount
fields.label: Total Taxable Income — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: gradNetIncome plus gradTotalOtherIncome. Multiplied by the applicable graduated rate (per the form's own printed Table 1 or Table 2, depending on tax year) to derive taxDueAmount (Item 46). System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 45A

fields.name: gradTotalTaxableIncomeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Total Taxable Income — Spouse
fields.description: gradNetIncome plus gradTotalOtherIncome. Multiplied by the applicable graduated rate (per the form's own printed Table 1 or Table 2, depending on tax year) to derive taxDueAmount (Item 46). System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 45B

fields.name: eightSalesRevenueAmount
fields.label: Sales/Revenues/Receipts/Fees — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 47A

fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.

fields.description: eightSalesRevenue minus eightSalesReturnsAllowancesDiscounts. System-computed.

fields.name: eightNetSalesSpouseAmount

fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 50 (description)

fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Description (line 2)
fields.description: The form provides exactly 2 lines for itemizing other non-operating income (items 50-51), with no stated continuation mechanism for a filer with more than 2 categories.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 51 (description)

fields.name: eightOtherIncome2Amount
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Amount (line 2) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 51A

fields.name: eightOtherIncome2SpouseAmount
fields.label: Other Non-Operating Income — Amount (line 2) — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 51B

fields.name: eightTotalOtherNonOperatingIncomeAmount
fields.label: Total Other Non-operating Income — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Sum of eightOtherIncome1 and eightOtherIncome2. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 52A

fields.name: eightTotalOtherNonOperatingIncomeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Total Other Non-operating Income — Spouse
fields.description: Sum of eightOtherIncome1 and eightOtherIncome2. System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 52B

fields.name: eightTotalTaxableIncomeAmount
fields.label: Total Taxable Income — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: eightNetSales plus eightTotalOtherNonOperatingIncome. System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 53A

fields.name: eightTotalTaxableIncomeSpouseAmount
fields.label: Total Taxable Income — Spouse
fields.description: eightNetSales plus eightTotalOtherNonOperatingIncome. System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 53B

fields.name: eightAllowableReductionAmount
fields.label: Less: Allowable reduction from gross sales/receipts and other non-operating income of purely self-employed individuals and/or professionals — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Capped at P250,000 per the form's own printed figure for this line.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 54A

fields.name: eightAllowableReductionSpouseAmount
fields.label: Less: Allowable reduction from gross sales/receipts and other non-operating income of purely self-employed individuals and/or professionals — Spouse
fields.description: Capped at P250,000 per the form's own printed figure for this line. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 54B

fields.name: eightTaxableIncomeAfterReductionAmount
fields.label: Taxable Income/(Loss) — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: eightTotalTaxableIncome minus eightAllowableReduction. Multiplied by 8% to derive taxDueAmount (Item 56). System-computed.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 55A

fields.name: eightTaxableIncomeAfterReductionSpouseAmount
fields.label: Taxable Income/(Loss) — Spouse
fields.description: eightTotalTaxableIncome minus eightAllowableReduction. Multiplied by 8% to derive taxDueAmount (Item 56). System-computed. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 55B

fields.name: priorYearExcessCreditsAmount
fields.label: Prior Year's Excess Credits — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 57A

fields.name: priorYearExcessCreditsSpouseAmount
fields.label: Prior Year's Excess Credits — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 57B

fields.name: taxPaymentsFirstThreeQuartersAmount
fields.label: Tax Payments for the First Three (3) Quarters — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 58A

fields.name: taxPaymentsFirstThreeQuartersSpouseAmount
fields.label: Tax Payments for the First Three (3) Quarters — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 58B

fields.name: creditableTaxWithheldFirstThreeQuartersAmount
fields.label: Creditable Tax Withheld for the First Three (3) Quarters — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 59A

fields.name: creditableTaxWithheldFirstThreeQuartersSpouseAmount
fields.label: Creditable Tax Withheld for the First Three (3) Quarters — Spouse
fields.description: Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 59B

fields.name: creditableTaxWithheldFourthQuarter2307Amount
fields.label: Creditable Tax Withheld per BIR Form No. 2307 for the 4th Quarter — Taxpayer/Filer
fields.description: Requires attaching BIR Form No. 2307 (Certificate of Creditable Tax Withheld at Source) as proof.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 60A

fields.name: creditableTaxWithheldFourthQuarter2307SpouseAmount
fields.label: Creditable Tax Withheld per BIR Form No. 2307 for the 4th Quarter — Spouse
fields.description: Requires attaching BIR Form No. 2307 (Certificate of Creditable Tax Withheld at Source) as proof. Only applicable when filing jointly.
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 60B

fields.name: taxPaidPreviouslyFiledAmendedReturn
fields.label: Tax Paid in Return Previously Filed, if this is an Amended Return
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 61A

fields.name: taxPaidPreviouslyFiledAmendedReturnSpouse
fields.label: Tax Paid in Return Previously Filed, if this is an Amended Return — Spouse
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 61B

fields.name: foreignTaxCredits
fields.label: Foreign Tax Credits, if applicable
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 62A

fields.name: foreignTaxCreditsSpouse
fields.label: Foreign Tax Credits, if applicable — Spouse
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 62B

fields.name: otherTaxCreditsDescription
fields.label: Other Tax Credits/Payments — specify
fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 63 (specify line)

fields.sourceRef: BIR Form No. 1701A (January 2018 ENCS, with rates), bir-cdn.bir.gov.ph p.2, Item 63A

fields.name: otherTaxCreditsSpouseAmount
